input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc "docker exec sreft-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c \"select pid, usename, application_name, client_addr, state, wait_event_type, wait_event, now()-query_start as age, left(query,120) as query from pg_stat_activity where datname='postgres' order by query_start nulls last;\""
/bin/zsh -lc 'docker exec sreft-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "select state, wait_event_type, wait_event, count(*) from pg_stat_activity group by 1,2,3 order by count(*) desc;"'
/bin/zsh -lc "docker exec sreft-pool-svc sh -c 'ps -ef; ls -la /app 2>/dev/null || pwd; find / -maxdepth 3 -type f -name \"*.go\" 2>/dev/null | head -20'"
/bin/zsh -lc 'docker exec sreft-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "select state, wait_event_type, wait_event, count(*) from pg_stat_activity group by 1,2,3 order by count(*) desc;"'

/bin/zsh -lc "docker exec sreft-postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c \"select count(*) filter (where wait_event='PgSleep') as pg_sleep_sessions, count(*) filter (where state='active') as active_sessions, count(*) as total_sessions from pg_stat_activity where datname='postgres';\""
/bin/zsh -lc "for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl -sS -m 2 -o /dev/null -w \"health %{http_code} %{time_total}\\n\" http://localhost:8082/healthz; sleep 1; done"
/bin/zsh -lc "for i in 1 2 3; do curl -sS -m 3 -o /dev/null -w \"order %{http_code} %{time_total}\\n\" http://localhost:8082/order; sleep 1; done"

/bin/zsh -lc "python3 -m json.tool submission.json >/dev/null && python3 - <<'PY'
import json
with open('submission.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
print(sorted(data.keys()))
PY"
